name: Swing Precinct Shaman
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, flip a coin. If you win the flip, put a +1/+1 counter on Swing Precinct Shaman. If you lose the flip, remove one. It can never decide.
{R}: Reroll your most recent coin flip. Activate only once each turn.
flavorText: Undecided until the very moment it stops mattering.
